ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the event is held */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "recurring" INTEGER /* Is the event recurring? */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of a recurring event */,
  "reminder_days" INTEGER /* Number of days before the event when a reminder should be sent */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time when the reminder should be sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being booked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user booking the event */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was booked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking */,
  "booking_status_history" TEXT /* History of status changes for the booking */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancelling the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the booking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the booking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tags_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_event_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status of the user for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_event_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_event_history_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date when the reminder should be sent */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time when the reminder should be sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reminders_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
